titleZh: 刘美芳诉常州凯瑞化学科技有限公司等公司决议效力确认纠纷案
titleEn: Gazette Case: Liu Meifang v. Changzhou Kairui Chemical Technology Co., Ltd. et al.
citation: 公报案例：股东除名决议
decisionType: 公司决议效力确认纠纷
holdingZh: 有限责任公司股东未履行出资义务或者抽逃全部出资，经催告后仍未补正的，公司可以依法以股东会决议解除其股东资格；但在参与表决的股东本身同样存在虚假出资或抽逃全部出资时，该部分股东行使除名表决权不具合法性基础，相关除名决议应认定无效。
holdingEn: A limited liability company may expel a shareholder by resolution if that shareholder still fails to cure full non-contribution or full capital withdrawal after demand, but the resolution is invalid where the voting shareholders themselves also engaged in sham contribution or total withdrawal and therefore lack a legitimate basis to wield expulsion power.
